anchor: Installer says no permission for approved software request.
positive: Cause: Application not targeted correctly. Fix: Assigned package properly, installation finished without errors.
negative: Cause: API response payload change from upstream broke downstream parser. Fix: Update downstream service to match upstream response format.

anchor: Cannot join secure office wireless network
positive: Cause: Machine certificate expired. Fix: Renewed device certificate and re-applied Wi-Fi profile.
negative: Cause: API contract change. Fix: Roll forward client configuration to current API contract.

anchor: Two-factor login failing on mobile app.
positive: Cause: Device token out of sync with identity platform. Fix: Reset MFA enrollment and re-register authenticator app.
negative: Cause: Stale local credentials in Outlook. Fix: Cleared credential cache and re-added account.

anchor: MFA code not working after changing phones
positive: Cause: Device token out of sync with identity platform. Fix: Reset MFA enrollment and re-register authenticator app.
negative: Cause: Application not targeted correctly. Fix: Assigned package properly, installation finished without errors.

anchor: Browser shows certificate warning or login loop
positive: Cause: Stale site data in browser cache and cookies. Fix: Reset affected browser cache and cookies.
negative: Cause: Previous token expired. Fix: Generated fresh password reset link.

anchor: Recover deleted file from backup
positive: Cause: File deleted and not recoverable via normal recycle bin. Fix: Restored from prior snapshot and placed back in shared folder.
negative: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.

anchor: Previous version of shared document needed restoration.
positive: Cause: Backup snapshots not used. Fix: Recovered copy from backup and placed back in shared folder.
negative: Cause: Proxy settings misconfigured. Fix: Reset old proxy configuration and reapply managed settings.

anchor: Disk almost full, apps failing due to lack of space.
positive: Cause: Local C drive cache and temp files oversized. Fix: Cleared local cache and temp files, restored free space.
negative: Cause: Repeated failed sign-ins. Fix: Account unlocked by IT support.

positive: Cause: Device token out of sync with identity platform. Fix: Reset MFA enrollment and re-register authenticator app.

anchor: Laptop C drive almost full, causing save failures and performance issues.
positive: Cause: Local profile cache consuming excessive space. Fix: Cleaned profile cache and temporary files, freeing up enough space.
